Hero.Title: AI PBX: The Future of Your Telephony Starts Here
Hero.SubTitle: Automate calls with AI assistants and analyze the quality of any conversation. Two products — one platform.

Problem.Title: Why Traditional Call Centers No Longer Work?

Expensive.Title: Expensive and Hard
Expensive.Desc: Hiring and training operators takes weeks, and costs grow with every new employee.

HumanFactor.Title: Human Factor
HumanFactor.Desc: Errors, fatigue, and inconsistent service quality lead to loss of customer loyalty.

OldIVR.Title: Outdated IVR
OldIVR.Desc: Customers hate "press 1, press 2". Modern consumers want live dialogue.

Solution.Title: Smart Platform for Automated Communication
Solution.Desc: AI PBX is not just a bot. It's a full-fledged voice assistant that understands context, remembers history, and is integrated into your business processes.

Step1.Title: Registration
Step1.Desc: Create an account and get access to the dashboard in seconds.

Step2.Title: Assistant Setup
Step2.Desc: Define personality, knowledge base, and choose one of the premium voices.

Step3.Title: Integration
Step3.Desc: Set up Webhooks and MCP servers to interact with your data.

Step4.Title: Telephony
Step4.Desc: Connect your Asterisk or get a ready-made SIP URI for inbound and outbound calls.

Step5.Title: Launch
Step5.Desc: Accept calls with full analytics and real-time quality control.

NLU.Title: Language Understanding
NLU.Desc: Dialogues based on modern LLMs that are practically indistinguishable from human.

ToolUse.Title: Functional Calls
ToolUse.Desc: The assistant can check order status or record a client in CRM on its own.

Analytics.Title: 24/7 Analytics
Analytics.Desc: Instant transcription, sentiment analysis, and detailed reports for every call.

WebRTC.Title: WebRTC Widgets
WebRTC.Desc: Allow clients to call you directly from the browser in one click.

DevFriendly.Title: Developer-friendly
DevFriendly.Desc: Full control via API. Integration with any logic through functional calls.

Asterisk.Title: Compatibility
Asterisk.Desc: Works with Asterisk, FreePBX, and any other system using the SIP protocol.

SpeechAnalytics.Title: Speech Analytics
SpeechAnalytics.SubTitle: Not just bots — analyze any call recording

AnyRecording.Title: Analyze Any Recording
AnyRecording.Desc: Upload audio files in any format — from call center recordings to Zoom meetings. AI transcribes and evaluates every conversation.

Metrics.Title: Flexible Metrics
Metrics.Desc: Create projects with any evaluation criteria — greeting, empathy, objection handling, or your own custom metrics. Unlimited scoring customization.

Insights.Title: AI Insights
Insights.Desc: AI finds patterns in your calls — conversion drops, negative trends, metric anomalies.

API.Title: API for Integrations
API.Desc: REST API with project tokens. Send recordings from your CRM or PBX automatically, receive results via webhook.

Support.Title: 24/7 Support
Support.Desc: Reduce load on the front line and provide instant answers to questions.

Sales.Title: Sales
Sales.Desc: Automatic lead qualification and incoming request processing without pauses.

Booking.Title: Service Booking
Booking.Desc: Voice booking and visit reminders in automatic mode.

Transparency.Title: Transparency
Transparency.Desc: Full control over decision logic and dialogue history.

Safety.Title: Data Protection
Safety.Desc: All calls and data are protected by modern encryption standards.

FinalCTA.Title: Ready to put your business on autopilot?
FinalCTA.SubTitle: Start call automation today and experience the power of voice AI.

SpeechAnalyticsPage.HeroTitle: Understand What Happens in Every Conversation
SpeechAnalyticsPage.HeroSubtitle: Upload recordings manually or send them automatically via API in real time — get detailed reports with quality scores, sentiment analysis, and AI recommendations.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.HowSubtitle: Manual upload or automatic integration — choose your path
SpeechAnalyticsPage.Step1Desc: Drag and drop audio files. Supports mp3, wav, ogg, m4a up to 50 MB. Specify operator, language, and project for contextual analysis.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.Step1bDesc: Connect REST API with a project token — recordings from your CRM or PBX are sent and analyzed automatically, in real time. Results arrive via webhook.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.Step2Desc: The system automatically transcribes the recording (STT), then the LLM scores the conversation across 9 metrics, determines sentiment, highlights key moments, and generates a summary.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.Step3Desc: Results appear on the dashboard: trend charts, sentiment distribution, average scores, activity heatmap, and AI Insights for spotting trends.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.DashboardSubtitle: KPI cards, charts, donut charts for sentiment and success rates, activity heatmap
SpeechAnalyticsPage.MetricsDesc: Every conversation is scored across 9 criteria. You can choose which metrics to display per project and add your own custom metrics.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.ApiSubtitle: Integrate analytics into your workflows via REST API
SpeechAnalyticsPage.ApiFeature1Desc: Create an API token and send recordings for analysis automatically from your CRM or PBX.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.ApiFeature2Desc: Upload dozens of files simultaneously. The system processes them in parallel with progress tracking.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.ApiFeature3Desc: Receive notifications about completed analyses or errors via webhook directly in your system.
SpeechAnalyticsPage.CTADesc: Start analyzing calls today. First 10 analyses are free.

VoiceAssistantsPage.HeroTitle: Create an AI Operator in 5 Minutes
VoiceAssistantsPage.HeroSubtitle: Describe the task in text, choose a voice, connect telephony — and your AI assistant is ready to take calls.
VoiceAssistantsPage.CreateSubtitle: Three steps from idea to working bot
VoiceAssistantsPage.Step1Desc: Write a prompt for the assistant: who it is, what it can do, what questions it asks. Choose a model (GPT-4o, Qwen), voice, and temperature. Connect functions for real-time actions.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Step2Desc: Call the assistant directly from the browser. Listen to the voice, check dialogue logic, make sure functions are called correctly. All without publishing.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Step3Desc: Create a SIP trunk for integration with any PBX. Supports two auth types (Registration and IP Auth), UDP/TCP/TLS protocols. Real-time registration status monitoring.
VoiceAssistantsPage.DialogSubtitle: A real example of an AI assistant talking to a customer
VoiceAssistantsPage.AudioDesc: A customer calls an appliance repair service — the assistant takes a service request for a technician to fix a dryer.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Feature_NLUDesc: Dialogues powered by GPT-4o and Qwen — virtually indistinguishable from talking to a human.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Feature_FunctionCallingDesc: The assistant can book a client, check order status, send a notification — right during the call.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Feature_MultiLangDesc: Works in Russian, English, German, Chinese, and Kazakh.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Feature_PremiumVoicesDesc: 10+ voices to choose from: male and female, calm and energetic. Find the perfect tone for your business.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Feature_MCPDesc: Connect external tools via Model Context Protocol for deep integration.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Feature_AutoAnalyticsDesc: Every call is automatically transcribed and analyzed. Sentiment, summary, metrics — no extra steps needed.
VoiceAssistantsPage.SipDesc: Connect your AI assistant to your IP-PBX via SIP trunk. Works with Asterisk, FreePBX, 3CX, Yeastar, and any other system.
VoiceAssistantsPage.SipFeature1: SIP server registration or IP-based auth
VoiceAssistantsPage.ChannelsSubtitle: Three ways to connect your assistant to real calls
VoiceAssistantsPage.Channel1Desc: Standard SIP address for connecting via any VoIP system. Inbound and outbound calls.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Channel2Desc: A 'Call' button on your website. Customers talk to the bot directly from the browser.
VoiceAssistantsPage.Channel3Desc: Direct connection to Asterisk via WSS and ARI. Full control over routing.
VoiceAssistantsPage.CaseClinicDesc: Appointment booking. The assistant collects data, checks the schedule, and confirms the appointment.
VoiceAssistantsPage.CaseSupportDesc: First-line support: FAQ answers, ticket creation, escalation to specialists.
VoiceAssistantsPage.CaseDeliveryDesc: Phone order intake. The assistant clarifies menu, address, time, and places the delivery order.
VoiceAssistantsPage.CaseHotelDesc: Room reservations, service information, wake-up calls.
VoiceAssistantsPage.CTADesc: Create your first AI assistant for free.
